events.title: Pokemon GO Fest 2026: Global
events.factualSummary: The free global event runs from 10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time on July 11 and 12, featuring rotating type habitats, Mega Mewtwo raids, and Special Research for Zeraora.
bonuses: Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokemon
Up to nine free Raid Passes per day from Gym Photo Discs
Up to six Special Trades and half Stardust cost for trades
One-hour Lure Modules and event Incense encounters
Mega Mewtwo X on Saturday and Mega Mewtwo Y on Sunday

events.title: Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration
events.factualSummary: Three consecutive celebration windows feature costumed Pikachu in the wild, raids, and Field Research, alongside a limited-time GO Pass.
bonuses: Pikachu appears more frequently and is easier to catch
GO Pass milestones can unlock double transfer Candy
GO Pass milestones can unlock double catch Stardust
